scope_note: QA Field 2-Form Bianchi Cert [509]. M1 of docs/specs/QA_MAXWELL_DERIVATION_PROGRAM.md, building on [508]. Primary mathematical source: Allen Hatcher, Algebraic Topology (2002), Ch. 2 boundary operator, ISBN 978-0-521-79540-1. Claims only exact finite cochain identity: edge potential A -> face field F=delta(A) -> volume Bianchi delta(F)=0. Allows homogeneous Maxwell/Bianchi identity wording for this exact carrier only; no full Maxwell derivation, no inhomogeneous equations, no Hodge/constitutive/source law, no physical field values.
